concept: Present / Here Now / In This Moment
description: Existing or occurring now; being in a particular place; fully attentive to the current moment. 'Nomi' names the quality of being here—not lost in past or future, but fully inhabiting the now.
sound_symbolism: The word arrives here. 'No' begins with grounded now, this moment. Then 'mi' embodies with intimate presence, fully here.
grammatical_notes: Functions as adjective: 'nomi miona' (present person). As verb: 'nomi' (to be present). As noun: 'lo nomi' (the present). Central to mindfulness vocabulary.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Presence is the heart of practice—returning again and again to this moment, this breath, this experience.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Present communication gives full attention—being here with the other, not elsewhere in mind.
